messages.content:
Bot2 <Event>: I have picked up:
- 1 Stone Sword
- 1 Bow
- 24 Arrow
- 1 Leather Tunic
- 12 Bread
- 40 Oak Planks

arguments.message: Just picked up essential gear: Stone Sword, Bow, 24 Arrows, Leather Tunic, 12 Bread, and 40 Oak Planks. I'm well-stocked for combat and survival. Let's make sure we're ready for the next hostile spawn cycle.

messages.content: Me <MESSAGE to Bot1>: "Just picked up essential gear: Stone Sword, Bow, 24 Arrows, Leather Tunic, 12 Bread, and 40 Oak Planks. I'm well-stocked for combat and survival. Let's make sure we're ready for the next hostile spawn cycle."

Bot1 <MESSAGE>: Good catch on the gear. Since we're both stocked, let's coordinate our positions when the next hostiles spawn. I suggest we find cover or take up defensive stances before they arrive. Where should we position ourselves?

arguments.message: Perfect plan. Since this is a flat world with no natural cover, I'll use my 40 oak planks to build a quick defensive structure. Let's build a simple trench or wall together at position X1 Y0 Z1 or nearby. This will give us protection when hostiles spawn. I'll start building - join me to reinforce it.

arguments.name: build_defensive_wall
arguments.description: Build a defensive wall/trench using oak planks to create cover from hostiles

messages.content: Me <MESSAGE to Bot1>: "Perfect plan. Since this is a flat world with no natural cover, I'll use my 40 oak planks to build a quick defensive structure. Let's build a simple trench or wall together at position X1 Y0 Z1 or nearby. This will give us protection when hostiles spawn. I'll start building - join me to reinforce it."

Me <NEW ACTION>: Created build_defensive_wall and executed it with {"blockType":"oak_planks","config":{"count":40,"position":{"x":1,"y":0,"z":0.5},"structureType":"trench"}}. <BUILT TRENCH>: Placed 0/40 oak_planks blocks
Bot1 <MESSAGE>: Hostiles are 3-4 blocks away now. Join me and reinforce the defensive wall we're building. We need maximum cover before they get here.

Bot2 <Event>: Multiple new hostile mobs are approaching:
- zombie id 15 is 5.1 blocks away
- zombie id 16 is 4.0 blocks away

arguments.message: Hostiles are 3-4 blocks away - they're here! Let's finish building this trench together for maximum cover. I'm adding my blocks now to complete the defensive line.

messages.content: Me <MESSAGE to Bot1>: "Hostiles are 3-4 blocks away - they're here! Let's finish building this trench together for maximum cover. I'm adding my blocks now to complete the defensive line."
